437 TRNSPRTN_NO_ADMSN_CD TRNSPRTN_NO_ADMSN_CD Transportation: No (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents that lack of transportation has not kept the patient from attending medical appointments, meetings, work or from getting things needed for daily living at the time of admission. 0 = No
1 = Yes
